hypothesis: Frozen v1.3 monolithic ExECT S2 field-family label policy on the full fixed validation split (40 records) with Qwen3.6:35b establishes the Thread C local-model anchor without changing S2 scorer semantics.
metric_caveats: This is the full fixed ExECTv2 validation split (40 records), not published ExECTv2 Table 1 reproduction.
These are partial ExECT S2 diagnostics (five families), not CUI-aware all-family benchmark reproduction.
GPT 4.1-mini frozen anchor: runs/exect_s2_validation_full_gpt4_1_mini_20260519T231223Z (80.9% micro F1; comorbidity 69.3%).
Pooled micro F1 across five families is not comparable to S1-only three-family headlines.
This config intentionally avoids ChainOfThought, BootstrapFewShot, and GEPA per docs/policies/qwen_dspy_latency_policy.md.
Do not compare this run to GPT full validation as the same experiment.
Monitor seizure and comorbidity families for multi-family drift vs GPT error reads.
Record local Ollama GPU residency or RAM offload when inspecting artifacts.
Evidence quote support should be reported separately from field-family precision, recall, and F1.
